text:
NAME: OIP_STAYS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Null/missing or 1–XXX 

COMMENT: The algorithm considers all claims (for the ACUTE_STAYS and OIP_STAYS variables). However, for the 
count of covered days (ACUTE_COV_DAYS and OIP_COV_DAYS) and payments (ACUTE_MDCR_PMT and 
OIP_MDCR_PMT), the algorithms include only claims that ended during the year of the data file, and 
where the payment amount was >= $0. 

There are two cost/use categories from the IP data files: Acute
